title: The VALIS Trilogy — Page 539
raw_text:
I finished my coffee and then left. The weather struck me as good. I felt a
lot better. And I could probably get almost thirty dollars for the record. I had
not seen a copy in years; it has long been out of print.
You must keep these things in mind when you operate a record store. And
acquiring it that day amounted to a sort of prize: for doing what I intended to
do anyhow. I had outsmarted Edgar Barefoot and I felt happy. Tim would
have enjoyed it. Were he alive.
